cover.subtitle:
8월 15일 중앙청,
제1공화국이 출범하다.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wide neoclassical government building (Jungang-cheong) silhouette with tall columns, viewed from front. In front of the steps: a small crowd of Korean civilians in suits and white hanbok, raising hands in celebration. A single tall pole with a stylized Korean flag silhouette flying (no readable taegeuk details). Color: warm gray building + small red and blue flag accents + amber sunlight from above. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 제헌헌법의 간선제 구조, 반민특위 무력화 과정(국회 프락치·공소시효 축소), 농지개혁의 유상매수·유상분배 원칙이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small classical government building silhouette with columns. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
